Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient

package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages
     
    it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServer
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ColorAvailableMessage
    Message from server to client notifying the available player colors.
    ColorChosenMessage
    Message from server to client notifying that a player has chosen a color.
    CoordinatesAvailableMessage
    Message from server to client notifying available coordinates for placing cards.
    CurrentPlayerHasPlayedMessage
    Message from server to client indicating whether the current player has already played a card in the current turn.
    CurrentPlayerMessage
    Message from server to client indicating the current player.
    DisplayedObjectiveMessage
    Message from server to client containing the displayed objective cards.
    DisplayedPlayableCardsMessage
    Message from server to client containing the displayed playable cards.
    ExceptionMessage
    Message from server to client to notify an exception occurred on the server.
    FirstMessage
    Message sent from server after the connection is established to set clientID.
    GameJoinedMessage
    Message sent from server to client when the client successfully joins a game.
    GameStateMessage
    Message sent from server to client to communicate the current game state.
    GoldDeckMessage
    Message sent from server to client to update the golden deck.
    GridMessage
    Message sent from server to client to update the grid for a specific player.
    HandCardsMessage
    Message sent from server to client to update the hand cards of a player.
    HandObjectiveMessage
    Message sent from server to client to update the objective cards in the player's hand.
    PlayersListMessage
    Message sent from server to client to update the list of player nicknames.
    RecieveChatMessage
    Message sent from server to client to deliver a chat message.
    ResourceDeckMessage
    Message sent from server to client to update the resource deck.
    ResourcesMessage
    Message sent from server to client to update the resources counter of a player.
    ScoreMessage
    Message sent from server to client to update the scores of players.
    SendGameListMessage
    Message sent from server to client to provide the list of active games.
    WinnerMessage
    Message sent from server to client to announce the winner of the game.
